meta.title: BREAKING: Russian fighter jet collides with US drone near Ukraine
meta.description:
A Russian Su-27 Flanker reportedly collided with an American MQ-9 Reaper drone over the international waters of the Black Sea, somewhere south of Ukraine. 

Here's what we know so far. 
#Ukraine #Russia #blacksea #intercept #airpower #military #defense #shorts
